rootCause: The reminder quest depended on completionist/polish but still gated entry on the pre-polish trophy item (Completionist Award II). The prerequisite polish process consumes that item and transforms it into Completionist Award II (polished), making the reminder quest unreachable.
resolution: Added a regression test in tests/questCompletableItems.test.ts that detects prerequisite process transformations consumed irreversibly and blocks dependent quest gates on those consumed items. Updated completionist/reminder to require Completionist Award II (polished) and refreshed completionist skill docs to match the true gate.
